commandHistory: I just did a git add --all . and got a bunch of files I don't want staged.  Can you undo the stage?
Actually, I want you to include those docs in the PR. Add, commit, and push the design doc with the rest.
Let's put our autoharness install into a feature branch and prepare it for PR and branch merge.
You can remove the agent-intercom capability pack from this installation.  It won't be necessary in this workspace.

Install autoharness into this workspace, which will be a python-based project designed to ingest, parse, and process documents an document sources of various types into normalized markdown content files prepared for a document ingestion pipeline into a graph and semantic embedding database.
